prompt: Make @prune/trajectory-diet modulate its advice using context health: when effective context fullness is high, the diet should become more aggressive. This requires a state reader in @prune/context-health that exposes the current context-health state to other packages, and a modulation layer in @prune/trajectory-diet that consumes it. Export the new modules from each package index. Both packages have failing tests specifying the behavior.
oracleCmd: (cd packages/context-health && npx vitest run src/state-reader.test.ts) && (cd packages/trajectory-diet && npx vitest run src/context-health-modulation.test.ts)
notes: Reference: trajectory-diet v2 (F6-aware modulation) 2026-06-02, restricted to the two library packages (MCP wiring excluded).
